prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing
search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an
item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST
125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit.

=== PRODUCT CONTEXT ===
SKU: UPD-PAWPTRL-STATIONERY-710335PT-HPNR
Product Type: OUTDOOR_RECREATION_PRODUCT
Brand (from catalog): Innovative Designs
Existing Title: Innovative Designs, LLC Paw Patrol School Supplies Set - Back to School Bundle Pack with Notebook, Folders, Pad, Pouch, Marker, Pencil, Eraser, Ruler and Sharpener, 11 Piece Superhero Stationary Set
Description: Start their first day of school enthusiastic with Paw Patrol's set of school supplies. Attractive prints of the beloved movie's characters such as Rubble, Marshall, and Chase are featured in the Paw Patrol stationary set to get kids excited to study and write. These favorite characters would inspire them to write, study, or draw. Boy Stationary Set and back to school supplies girls inspire them and takes off some items from the list of things they need for school. The Paw Patrol stationary for boys is for all little kids who love watching Paw Patrol and especially loves Chase, Rubble, and Marshall. This school stationery set will make your little one happy and excited as each piece features Paw Patrol artwork characters like Chase, Rubble, and Marshall. A boys and girls school supply set to add to their Paw Patrol-themed school stuff. Your little hero would be thrilled to get back to school with the Paw Patrol School Supply Set. The girl or boy school supplies bundle pack has all they need for their first day of school and also can be a great gift and cool stationery gift set for kids to motivate them to be creative and study. Girls and boys school supplies like Paw Patrol school stationery set are made with durable, excellent quality materials for your little one's first day of school. Premium quality school supplies add on gift to children as cute party favors goody bags pencil set for kids events, holiday gifts, and special occasions. All basic back to school supplies for kindergarten, preschool, or elementary kid needs is in this boys school supplies set. The back to school Paw Patrol set includes 2 Portfolio folders, 1 Paw Patrol journal notebook, 2 Mini Markers, 1 Pad, 1 Eraser, 1 Superhero Pencil Sharpener, 1 Ruler (6-inch), 1 Pencil Case, 1 Mechanical Pencil. The 2 portfolio folders measure 12Lx9W inches while the 40-sheet notebook measures 10.5Lx8W inches—handy sizes for kids. Recommended for kids age 3 and up.
Search Terms: (none)
Features:
- THE PAW PATROL SCHOOL SUPPLIES COMES WITH A UNIQUE DESIGN YOU WILL LOVE – Your little hero would be thrilled to get back to school with the Paw Patrol School Supply Set! A girl and boy school supplies bundle pack that has all they need for their first day of school and also can be a great gift and cool stationery gift set for kids to motivate them to be creative and study.
- THE PAW PATROL SCHOOL SUPPLIES FOR BOYS AND GIRLS IS FOR LITTLE PAW PATROL FANS – The Paw Patrol stationery set is for all kids who love watching Paw Patrol Series and loves the show's characters. This school stationery set will make your little one happy and excited as each piece features Paw Patrol artwork characters like Marshall, Rubble, and Chase. A boys and girls school supply set to add to their Paw Patrol-themed school collection.
- INCLUDED WITH THE PURCHASE OF PAW PATROL SCHOOL SUPPLY SET FOR GIRLS AND BOYS - The back to school Paw Patrol set includes 2 Portfolio folders, 1 Paw Patrol journal notebook, 2 Mini Markers, 1 Pad, 1 Eraser, 1 Superhero Pencil Sharpener, 1 Ruler (6-inch), 1 Pencil Case, 1 Mechanical Pencil. The 2 portfolio folders measure 12Lx9W inches while the 40-sheet notebook measures 10.5Lx8W inches—handy sizes for kids. Recommended for kids age 3 and up.
- HIGH-QUALITY PAW PATROL STATIONERY SET – Paw Patrol school stationery set are made with durable, excellent quality materials for your little one's first day of school. Premium quality school supplies add on gift to children as cute party favors goody bags pencil set for kids events, holiday gifts, and special occasions. All basic back to school supplies for kindergarten, preschool, or elementary kid needs is in this boys school supplies set.
- IDEAL USE FOR PAW PATROL 11-PIECE SCHOOL STATIONARY SET – Start their first day of school enthusiastic with stationary sets for boys. Attractive prints of the beloved characters such as Rubble, Chase, and Marshall are featured in the Paw Patrol superhero stationery set to get kids excited to study and write. School stationary kit and writing supplies for girls inspire kids and get them excited about doing their homework and school activities.

=== ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) ===
Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title,
not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order:
  ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name}
- brand: use the catalog brand above.
- pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a
  dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent.
- size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS).
Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number.
Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters.
Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing

=== TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) ===
Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most
search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a
repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable").
Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the
highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point.
Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep
acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out
"&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And
International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are
allowed.
Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name.

=== RETURN ===
Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape:
{"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Innovative Designs Paw Patrol 11-Piece School Supplies Set

openai.item_name: Innovative Designs 11-Pc Paw Patrol School Supplies Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: Notebook, Folders, Markers, Pencil Case, Sharpener, Back To School Bundle, Ages 3 And Up

openai.title_differentiation: Notebook, Folders, Pad, Pencil Case, Mechanical Pencil, Markers, Ruler, Sharpener, Eraser, Kids Ages 3 And Up
